dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S3343 IS: Unemployment Insurance (UI) Integrity and Deficit Reduction Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Ms. Cortez Masto (for herself and Ms. Ernst) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Rules and Administration

form.official-title: To provide for additional funding for grants for reemployment services and eligibility assessments through a reduction in funds in the Presidential Election Campaign Fund.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Unemployment Insurance (UI) Integrity and Deficit Reduction Act.

section.header: Additional funding for grants for reemployment services and eligibility assessments
section.text: For purposes of making grants under section 306 of the Social Security Act (42 U.S.C. 506), the unobligated balance, as of the date of enactment of this section, of the amounts in the fund established by section 9006(a) of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 is transferred to the Employment Security Administration Account of the Unemployment Trust Fund. The amount transferred under the preceding sentence shall remain available until expended.
